programme.title: E9 - The Falquet Brothers, Snow Dreamers
programme.desc: Nicolas and Loris Falquet are at the cutting edge when it comes to freeriding. Directing and producing films about board sports, the brothers are as creative on skis as they are behind the camera. Originally from Lausanne, the brothers made Les Marecottes their playground some twenty years ago.

programme.title: E46 - In Autun (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Autun, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the town's cathedral and in its heritage.

programme.title: E17 - Renoir/Priscilla Royer/Chitose Abe/Aurelie Boyer
programme.desc: In Essoyes, visit the studio home of the painter Pierre-Auguste Renoir. At the heart of the 19M workshops, meet Priscilla Royer, artistic director of the iconic millinery house Maison Michel Paris. Designer Chitose Abe draws on her archives to reinvent them. Cabinetmaker Aurelie Boyer restores wooden furniture and objects.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E8 - Calming Colors
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E4 - Baby John Learns About Yummy Food!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about yummy food! First, he explores the world of vegetables & learns that they are not only delicious but also essential for staying strong & healthy. Then, the family has fun making & tasting all sorts of delicious & healthy fruit juices. The tasty adventure continues as the kids learn to make colorful popsicles with yummy fruits & Miss Hannah turns healthy fruit into fun animal faces!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - From Mail To Outer Space!
programme.desc: Blippi is on adventures big & small, from the mail to outer space! First, Blippi shrinks down to go inside the BlippiMobile's engine to fix a problem. Then, he follows a letter he wrote on its entire journey through the post office to Grandpa Blippi’s mailbox! After that, he flies into outer space on a rocket, floating in zero gravity & performing a space walk. He even joins a boulder on its exciting trip down a river to become a grain of sand!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E1 - Deadly Intruders
programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up. Watch Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E1 - Leaping Into Life
programme.desc: It’s spring, and the farm is bursting with new life. Watch a ewe give birth to twins, an orphaned Hereford calf struggle to find a surrogate mother, and the top hen nestle down in her maternity coop.

programme.title: E5 - Etosha: The Great White Place
programme.desc: Etosha was once a great lake that dried up and now only fills with water seasonally during the summer rains. Once the Etosha pan is full of water, a myriad of water birds congregate in the shallow lake to breed, most notably Greater and lesser flamingos.

E1 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Only 3% of the water on Earth is fresh. But as the planet warms, there will be lesser fresh water to go around.

programme.title: E5 - Running Free
programme.desc: From wolves to pampered pooches, this 5 part landmark series reveals how the best friend that sits at your feet became so specialised.

programme.title: E1 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Only 3% of the water on Earth is fresh. But as the planet warms, there will be lesser fresh water to go around.

programme.title: E5 - Running Free
programme.desc: From wolves to pampered pooches, this 5 part landmark series reveals how the best friend that sits at your feet became so specialised.

programme.title: E7 - Danger At Dawn
programme.desc: Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Albert Flores enforces fishing laws, Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers & Jayme Deschaaf schools dove hunters

programme.title: E1 - Bastion Of The Tiger Moms
programme.desc: Introduction of Tadoba forests, 4 tigresses & risks to their cubs, different hunting styles & other species.

programme.title: E5 - Running Free
programme.desc: From wolves to pampered pooches, this 5 part landmark series reveals how the best friend that sits at your feet became so specialised.

programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dee Thornell and her staff as they handle extreme cases and clients unique to the Last Frontier State.

programme.title: E1 - Bastion Of The Tiger Moms
programme.desc: Introduction of Tadoba forests, 4 tigresses & risks to their cubs, different hunting styles & other species.

programme.title: E1 - The Panda's Kingdom
programme.desc: In southwestern China, towering mountains provide shelter for nearly 2,000 wild giant pandas.

programme.title: E5 - Down To The Wire
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dee Thornell and her staff as they handle extreme cases and clients unique to the Last Frontier State.

programme.title: E1 - Bastion Of The Tiger Moms
programme.desc: Introduction of Tadoba forests, 4 tigresses & risks to their cubs, different hunting styles & other species.

programme.title: E5 - Down To The Wire
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dee Thornell and her staff as they handle extreme cases and clients unique to the Last Frontier State.

programme.title: E1 - Bastion Of The Tiger Moms
programme.desc: Introduction of Tadoba forests, 4 tigresses & risks to their cubs, different hunting styles & other species.

programme.title: Sleep Well, Mr Bear!
programme.desc: It's winter, and many animals in the park are hibernating. But Oto can't stop himself from being noisy, and he wakes them up! Now the children and Yoko must find a way to help the animals fall asleep again.

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: Larry the Unusual Robot
programme.desc: The doctors look at vomit and meet a vomiting robot. Dr. Xand delivers blood to a hospital for an emergency, and they meet patients with bike and football injuries.

programme.title: Same But Different
programme.desc: This episode is all about capacity. If two containers have the same surface area but one of them is a tall, narrow cylinder and the other one a short, wide one: Can they store the same amount of beads? How is this possible?

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Gala Day
programme.desc: It is Gala day, and the theme is the Frozen Kingdom. The Ice Stars gather together for what promises to be a sensational performance. But as the skaters are getting ready, some shattering news breaks at the rink.

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Sleep Well, Mr Bear!
programme.desc: It's winter, and many animals in the park are hibernating. But Oto can't stop himself from being noisy, and he wakes them up! Now the children and Yoko must find a way to help the animals fall asleep again.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: In Clyde's Eyes
programme.desc: It's grooming day at the pet shop, and a poster of animal eyes makes Luna and Jupiter wonder how Clyde sees the world. When experiments fail, the trio becomes ferrets to see through Clyde's eyes and discover how animals view things differently.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: Wizard School
programme.desc: Robbie and Carol are kept back after school, and alone in the classroom, come across a couple of ancient spell books. An epic battle of magic begins.

programme.title: What is Pi?
programme.desc: One mathematical number that can be found everywhere is Pi. Discover the many ways in which we use pi in our calculations, and where it can be found.

programme.title: An Important Job
programme.desc: The dog of one of the Vet School's top vets has cancer and is coming in for a scan. Morgan and Amblessed are privileged to be given this job. Lauren and Saira have an excruciating wait as they test the homeless cat Finbar for a deadly disease.

programme.title: The Inside Story of Eyes and Fat
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look right into the eye. They discover what body fat does and look at it under the microscope. In the emergency room, there is a patient with a bad rash, and another with a nasty fingernail infection.

programme.title: Politics in the World of Ants
programme.desc: The queen is head of the ant colony. Each ant has a specific role to play and their way of getting food is sometimes revolting. Honeypot ants can have nests with more than one queen. That can lead to ant wars.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: E1489
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.title: E384
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E627
programme.desc: CHIT CHAT WITH ME: Chit Chat With Me packs with news from all over the world, including hot social issues, new moves in the cultural circles and many more, it delivers vivid, kaleidoscopic and glossy news to the audience in the weekend.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.title: The Magic Of Colors
programme.desc: Colors make our homes more beautiful. They make our clothes more stylish. And colors are indispensable for art. But what looks beautiful can also be toxic: Many colors contain substances like mercury, lead, or chromium.

programme.title: My Body, My Heart
programme.desc: The heart is the most unusual muscle in our body. It works tirelessly, begins beating in the womb and can even continue functioning when the brain fails. Yet, when we're young, we barely pay any attention to it.

Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin – but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin – but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: A women's prison in the Northern China in 1932, Prisoner FU Yuan (JIANG Yiyan) digs a tunnel in her prison cell with a silver spoon and escapes. Inspector SONG Donglu (LAU Ching-wan) is summoned to investigate FU's escape. By tracking down the letters sent to him by FU, it sets SONG off to Hong City to unravel FU's disappearance.

programme.title: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: In the year 2029, advances in cybernetic technology allowed people to replace body parts and organs for robotic ones. Even the brain could be replaced with a cyber-brain with the ability to gain access to the internet and different networks. Major Motoko Kusanagi, a cyborg agent working for the government, and her team have been given the assignment to track down the notorious hacker known as ‘The Puppetmaster' and uncover his plans. Her mission explores the escalating synergy between humanity and technology, while questioning the very essence of sentient existence.

programme.title: Expect a Miracle
programme.desc: Miss Sung has come to Hong Kong to be a teacher, and hopefully moonlight as a model. On the Internet, she starts to talk with 'Blue Moon', a photographer. While attempting to shoot, the two have an argument, and Sung seems to lose her chance at being a model, until a second consideration by Jet leads to a completed shoot. Love between the two begins to bloom, but Jet's stepsister, who is also one of Miss Sung's students, starts to interfere, and may just ruin everything.

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc

programme.desc: Daring Danny's at it again, luckily the Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller. // Ryder and the Pups pair up with Alex and his mini patrol to retrieve mysteriously missing items.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E147 - Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: E152 - School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: E103 - Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: E205 - Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E103 - Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: E720 - Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E110 - Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: E808 - Father's Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George take it upon themselves to make this Father's Day the best Father's Day ever.

programme.title: E809 - Funny Music
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a new synthesiser. Peppa, George and Mummy Pig have fun finding and sampling different sounds from around the house!

programme.title: E5 - Spies In The Outback - The Secrets Of Pine Gap

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E9 - Rotterdam
programme.desc: Jack learns about Britain’s history with ice cream and the famous spotted dick dessert. Then, he heads to Rotterdam where he meets the dessert’s Dutch cousin.

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E9 - Livret A, Life Insurance: Where Is Our Money Going?
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or <<sustainable development>>, the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: E1806
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Tabing Ilog
programme.desc: Eight teenagers struggling to find themselves and their true purpose. All things lead and build up to form friendship and love which will transform them for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. programme.title: E15 - 同頻比心動更重要
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 反向推理 神助攻臥底躺贏
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: NBA Playoffs Presented by Google Pixel 2026 -E. Conf. 1st Rd Game 7 - Toronto Raptors vs Cleveland Cavaliers
NBA Playoffs Presented by Google Pixel 2026 -E. Conf. 1st Rd Game 7 - Toronto Raptors vs Cleveland Cavaliers
E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1 - It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.

programme.title: E3 - Peanuts Get Yer Peanuts
programme.desc: The class express themselves in the annual Peanut Pageant.

programme.title: E4 - The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: E5 - Funky Monkey
programme.desc: Li'l D plots to get into the upper class' production.

programme.title: E9 - Tiger Sharks
programme.desc: As the team prepare for their great hammerhead experience, Steve has one more dive he wants some of them to experience. He takes four of the divers out to the wreck of an old ship which, over the years, has been colonised by a myriad of marine life. The young divers enter an underwater world inhabited by stunning fish and ocean turtles.

programme.title: E10 - Great Hammerhead Sharks
programme.desc: The team of young shark saviours are coming to the end of their time in the shark sanctuary around the island of Bimini in the Bahamas. Now, they are on their last dive - to see great hammerheads.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E17 - Good Hands
programme.desc: After a tragedy, Joan treats an old friend, pushing Amy to face her illness. Richard and TJ clash over a reckless tech bro.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall (Denzel Washington) has struggled to reconcile the horrific things he's done in the past and finds a strange solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed.

programme.title: E3 - Annie's Essentials

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III
programme.desc: The year is 1974. A young Hong Kong Chinese, Mark, travels to Saigon to make his fortune. There, he encounters a mysterious femme fatale, the lovely Kit. As he becomes more involved in her various underworld deals, a tragic romance develops. On the eve of the outbreak of war, Kit's past returns to endanger her, and Mark must risk everything for the one true love of his life...
